channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Tackling "Celeb Bait" Scams: Meta's Efforts to Combat Financial Crimes on Social Media
item.description: Meta removes 8,000 scam ads from Facebook and Instagram, partnering with Australian banks to curb 'celeb bait' scams and prevent financial losses.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: DoJ revising vulnerability disclosure framework to encourage AI red teaming
item.description: DoJ says its policy will encourage independent security and safety research, but will large AI companies follow suit in encouraging vulnerability disclosure? The post DoJ revising vulnerability disclosure framework to encourage AI red teaming first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: The VP debate was a return to the politics of yesteryear—except on Truth Social
item.description: Minutes before the start of the debate vice presidential debate, Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump made a commitment of nonpartisanship. “We’re going to keep it very straight, see how they do,” he said in a video posted to Truth Social, the social platform he owns.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Nvidia RTX 4060 graphics cards are finally impressing PC gamers – and we’re betting they’ll soon be the most popular GPUs around
item.description: Nvidia’s RTX 4060 models had a lukewarm reception, but these GPUs are rapidly becoming popular – and likely set to dominate in the near future.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What to expect from Apple this October and beyond
item.description: The Apple product machine continues to whirr, with a host of new products, including Macs, iPads, and iPhone SE, expected to appear this fall.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Tesla posts first quarterly increase in deliveries, but shares slump with investors hoping for more
item.description: Low interest financing, sweet lease deals, price cuts and free charging boosted Tesla’s global deliveries in the third quarter, the first increase this year for the electric vehicle maker.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Why determining the cost of cloud services cuts across an entire agency
item.description: Do you know your true cloud costs? The post Why determining the cost of cloud services cuts across an entire agency first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Details from New Mexico's lawsuit against Snap show site failed to act on reports of sextortion
item.description: Snapchat failed to act on “rampant” reports of child grooming, sextortion and other dangers to minors on its platform, according to a newly unredacted complaint against the company filed by New Mexico's attorney general. Attorney General Raúl Torrez filed the original complaint on Sept.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: PyTorch library makes models faster and smaller
item.description: The PyTorch Foundation, makers of the PyTorch machine learning framework, has launched torchao, a PyTorch native library that makes models faster and smaller by leveraging low-bit dtypes, sparsity, and quantization.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Epic Games is suing Google and Samsung for this phone setting
item.description: Video game maker Epic Games sued Google and Samsung on Monday, accusing the tech companies of coordinating to block third-party competition in application distribution on Samsung devices.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Jersey offshore wind farm clears big federal hurdle amid environmental concerns
item.description: SEA GIRT, N.J. (AP) — The federal government gave a key approval Tuesday to an offshore wind farm in New Jersey, even as residents in the town where its power cable would come ashore worry it could go through underground toxic waste that's still being cleaned up. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: FTC Lawsuit Against Amazon Partially Dismissed: Key Developments
item.description: Federal Trade Commission lawsuit against Amazon partially dismissed, judge rules out some anticompetitive practices
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: How to use Loop components in Microsoft 365 apps
item.description: Microsoft’s ambitious collaboration app, Microsoft Loop, includes shared workspaces as well as portable content snippets called Loop components. These components can be shared and embedded in multiple Microsoft 365 apps.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft Outlines Plans to Secure Windows Recall Feature Ahead of Launch
item.description: Microsoft secures Windows Recall feature ahead of launch, addressing data security and privacy concerns with biometric authentication, encryption, and user controls
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI bad actors 'not very Christian'
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft adds safety tools to Azure AI Studio
item.description: Now that the initial euphoria about generative AI’s capabilities has worn off, reality is setting in: Large language models without appropriate safeguards can be remarkably naïve and are all too willing to share all they know.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amazon's $4 billion partnership with AI startup Anthropic gets UK competition clearance
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Friday that it's clearing Amazon's partnership with artificial intelligence company Anthropic because the $4 billion deal didn't qualify for further scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Police are probing apparent cyber vandalism on Wi-Fi networks at UK train stations
item.description: LONDON (AP) — U.K. transport officials and police said Thursday they are investigating a “cyber-security incident” after users of public Wi-Fi networks at the country’s biggest railway stations reported being shown anti-Muslim messages.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: One Tech Tip: Using Instagram's new teen account settings to supervise young users
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Worried about your teen's Instagram use? Faced with growing pressure to do more to stop online harm, the social media platform has rolled out a major new update to protect young people and give parents more control.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: OpenAI Chief Technology Officer Mira Murati and 2 other execs are leaving the ChatGPT maker
item.description: A high-ranking executive at OpenAI who served a few days as its interim CEO during a period of turmoil last year said she's leaving the artificial intelligence company.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NTSB engineer says carbon fiber hull from submersible showed signs of flaws
item.description: The carbon fiber hull of the experimental submersible that imploded en route to the wreckage of the Titanic had imperfections dating to the manufacturing process and behaved differently after a loud bang was heard on one of the dives the year before the tragedy, an engineer with the National Transpo
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE and DAVID SHARP, Associated Press, ABC 4
